perturbation.original_text: (vi) the Agent represents and warrants that with respect to Offered Shares to be sold in reliance on Rule 506(b) of Regulation D, none of it, the U.S. Affiliate, any of its or the U.S. Affiliate's directors, executive officers, general partners, managing members or other officers participating in the Offering, or any other person associated with the Agent who will receive, directly or indirectly, remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers of Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D (each, a "Dealer Covered Person" and, together, "Dealer Covered Persons"), is subject to any Disqualification Event except for a Disqualification Event (i) covered by Rule 506(d)(2)(i) of Regulation D and (ii) a description of which has been furnished in writing to the Corporation prior to the date hereof;
perturbation.changed_text: (vi) the Agent represents and warrants that with respect to Offered Shares to be sold in reliance on Rule 506(b) of Regulation D, none of it, the U.S. Affiliate, any of its directors or executive officers is subject to any Disqualification Event except for a Disqualification Event (i) covered by Rule 506(d)(2)(i) of Regulation D and (ii) a description of which has been furnished in writing to the Corporation prior to the date hereof;
perturbation.explanation: The modified text narrows the scope of who is considered a 'Dealer Covered Person' by removing 'general partners, managing members or other officers participating in the Offering, or any other person associated with the Agent who will receive, directly or indirectly, remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers of Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D'. This creates an in-text contradiction because the warranty now only covers directors and executive officers, but Rule 506(b) has broader implications for other persons, leaving ambiguity about whether those individuals are required to not have any Disqualification Events. Thus, this warranty no longer provides full coverage for compliance, as intended by the original agreement. This modification will impact (vii) since, it has a direct link with this one.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (vii) the Agent represents that it is not aware of any person (other than any Dealer Covered Person) that has been or will be paid (directly or indirectly) remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers in connection with the sale of any Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D;
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows the scope of 'Dealer Covered Person' by removing 'general partners, managing members or other officers participating in the Offering, or any other person associated with the Agent who will receive, directly or indirectly, remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers of Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D.' This creates a contradiction with paragraph (vii) which refers to 'any Dealer Covered Person'. Now the agent only warrants for its directors or executive officers, but paragraph (vii) still speaks about other people that are no longer included in the 'Dealer Covered Person', generating ambiguity about the Agent's responsibilities in relation to those other people, potentially creating an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: (vii) the Agent represents that it is not aware of any person (other than any Dealer Covered Person) that has been or will be paid (directly or indirectly) remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers in connection with the sale of any Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D; and (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: (vii) the Agent represents that it is not aware of any person that has been or will be paid (directly or indirectly) remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers in connection with the sale of any Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D; and (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, except as otherwise agreed upon in writing.
perturbation.explanation: The removed of '(other than any Dealer Covered Person)' from (vii) and addition of 'except as otherwise agreed upon in writing' in (viii) creates a conflict. The original (vii) allows remuneration for Dealer Covered Persons, however the new wording does not allow remuneration for any person; meanwhile the addition of 'except as otherwise agreed upon in writing' in (viii), opens the door for the Agent to conduct the offer not in accordance with the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (vii) the Agent represents that it is not aware of any person that has been or will be paid (directly or indirectly) remuneration for solicitation of Subscribers in connection with the sale of any Offered Shares pursuant to Rule 506(b) of Regulation D; and (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, except as otherwise agreed upon in writing.
perturbation.justification: The removal of '(other than any Dealer Covered Person)' from (vii) creates a contradiction with the original intent. The addition of 'except as otherwise agreed upon in writing' in (viii) gives the Agent leeway to deviate from the Agency Agreement, potentially conflicting with other sections that assume strict adherence to the agreement's terms. These changes introduces conflicting obligations, and therefore an in-text contradiction.
